name: Prestix Assistant-First Refactor + Conversation Learning
objective: Transform Prestix from dual-mode UX into one unified assistant with live interpreter as a capability, conversation learning, and ambient listening foundation — without rewriting core files.

context_files.reason: Full architecture context, file constraints, and validation requirements

exit_criteria: All 53+ existing tests pass (13 test files, zero regressions)
TypeScript compilation passes for all interpreter files (tsc --noEmit)
New test files cover conversationLearner, enhanced learningStore, ambientListener, dynamic languageMarkers
Dual-mode UX replaced with single assistant identity — no 'two modules' feeling
translatorEnabled repurposed as 'force translate' override, not separate mode
Conversation learning pipeline detects slang, captures corrections, scores confidence
API route feeds learning back from successful translations
Ambient listener foundation exists as passive capture module
